text: Hello, I’ve been experiencing issues with my app lately. It crashes unexpectedly and I’m not really sure what causes it. Sometimes it happens when I try to load certain features, but I can't remember which ones exactly. Could you please help me figure this out? I really need my app to work properly.
I don't know what's happening! The app keeps crashing, and I'm really upset about it! Can someone help me?
my account, I can't log in. it says wrong password but I reset it. help!
I'm so frustrated! My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it, but I just updated it yesterday. I thought updates were supposed to fix problems, not create new ones!
I'm just feeling really lost and confused about what features are included in the pro version compared to the business tier. Can you please help me understand? It’s been on my mind a lot.
Could you please provide me with information regarding the procedure for recovering my account if I have forgotten my credentials? I seem to lack specific guidance on this matter.

I wish to express my dissatisfaction regarding the delay in the delivery of my order. It was supposed to arrive within two days, but it has now exceeded that timeframe without any updates provided. Could you please clarify the situation?
I need my money back! I asked for a refund but nothing has happened. Can you fix this?
I seem to be having some issues accessing my account, but I’m not exactly sure what’s wrong. It would be great if you could help me figure this out.

I placed an order for a really nice set of headphones on a special promotion, and the tracking said it would arrive last Friday. It’s now Wednesday, and not only has my package not shown up, but I also have this email from you about a subscription I didn’t sign up for! Can we please fix this? It’s really frustrating because I was looking forward to using those headphones while cooking dinner!
i was charged but i thought it was a trial, can u help?!? messed up pls fix
I need help understanding my bill, is my last payment really for two months? I thought it was just one.
My app is crashing when I try to log in, but sometimes it works? What's going on?
I can't log into my account anymore. The password isn’t working. Please help.

I've been trying to access my account for the past few days, and it keeps saying my password is incorrect, which is confusing because I'm sure I haven't changed it recently. But then again, maybe I did forget it, but I don't think so! Can someone help me figure this out? It's really frustrating and I just want to get back in, and I've already tried resetting it but it didn't work, so now I'm just really stuck and don't know what to do next.
I believe my account has been compromised, but I have not been able to access it. Can you assist me? I thought I had changed my password recently, though.
